title: moricandia crenulata
intro: Moricandia crenulata, also known as mountain rocket or field purslane, is a perennial plant in the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Moricandia crenulata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Moricandia crenulata is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed raw in salads or as a cooked vegetable.
